message:
feat(codegen): Improve C extension module handling for numpy tests

- Add CExtFromImport struct to track from-imports from C extension modules
- Detect submodules of C extension packages (e.g., numpy.testing when numpy is installed)
- Generate var declarations for C ext from-imports with main() initialization
- Mark imports inside function bodies as potentially erroring (for !void return types)
- Add c_extension_from_imports tracking field to NativeCodegen

These changes improve support for running numpy tests with metal0, though
full numpy.testing support requires additional Python import semantics.
